generated_oml:
instance DigitalShadowDataCollector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects contextual data traces from the physical system to form the Digital Shadow, feeding computational models."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ContextualDataTransmission
]

instance ContextualDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DigitalShadowDataCollector
]

instance ContextualDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated contextual data trace defined by the Digital Shadow reference model, serving as input for computational models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ContextualDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ExecutionEngineSimulink, MontiArcExecutionEngine
]

instance SimulinkExecutionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink representation of computational models derived from SysML v1.7 state-machine diagrams and MontiArc automata, for execution and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ExecutionEngineSimulink
]

instance MontiArcBehaviouralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc behavioural model derived from SysML state-machine diagrams, enabling behavioural simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcExecutionEngine
]

instance ExecutionEngineSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution engine enabling Simulink execution of computational models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkModelExecutionService
]

instance MontiArcExecutionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution engine enabling MontiArc execution of behavioural models."
    DTDFVocab:enables MontiArcModelExecutionService
]

instance SimulinkModelExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service orchestrating Simulink execution of computational models and producing simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight, GenerateSimulationReportAction
]

instance MontiArcModelExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service orchestrating MontiArc execution of behavioural models and producing simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides MontiArcResultInsight, GenerateMontiArcReportAction
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight obtained from Simulink simulation results."
]

instance MontiArcResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight obtained from MontiArc behavioural simulation results."
]

instance GenerateSimulationReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically generates a simulation report from Simulink execution outputs."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateMontiArcReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically generates a report from MontiArc simulation outputs."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
